blended.narrative: Waterville Valley is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,155 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
